data.title: Ethereum’s Breakout Above The MA50 Suggests Further Upside, Here’s The Target
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) has decisively broken above a resistance level, the 50-day Exponential Moving Average (EMA50), igniting renewed bullish momentum across the market. This breakout marks a significant shift in market trend, opening the door for a potential rally toward higher targets around the $4,000 level. Ethereum Targets $4,000 After EMA50 Breakout The Ethereum price has delivered an explosive rally after its recent breakout above the EMA50 barrier. Given this development, crypto analyst Doctor Profit has forecasted on the X social media that ETH is gearing up for a massive surge toward $4,000
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-breakout-above-ma50/

data.title: After Seven Long Years, Ripple’s XRP Sets $3.65 All-Time High As Market Cap Smashes Through $200 Billion
data.description:
The price of Ripple's XRP has been on a parabolic tear in recent days amid a broader cryptocurrency market rally.
source: https://zycrypto.com/after-seven-long-years-ripples-xrp-sets-3-65-all-time-high-as-market-cap-smashes-through-200-billion/

data.title: The Retail Crypto Comeback: Why This Time Feels Different
data.description:
"The Retail Crypto Comeback: Why This Time Feels Different" can be expanded into a more detailed and elaborate sentence like this:

"The resurgence of cryptocurrency among retail investors is gaining momentum once again, and what sets this rebound apart from previous waves of interest is a confluence of factors including increased regulatory clarity, the maturation of blockchain technology, widespread adoption of digital assets, and a growing awareness of the potential for financial independence, making this moment in the crypto landscape feel distinctly more promising and sustainable."
source: https://blocknews.com/the-retail-crypto-comeback-why-this-time-feels-different/

data.title: Inside the Controversial Powell Fed Renovation Trump Calls ‘Ostentatious’
data.description:
Jerome Powell defended the $2. 5 billion renovation of the Fed's historic headquarters, pushing back against the Trump administration's accusations of mismanagement.

The post Inside the Controversial Powell Fed Renovation Trump Calls ‘Ostentatious’ first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/07/18/trump-vs-powell-fed-pricey-renovation/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-vs-powell-fed-pricey-renovation

data.title: LEASH Surges Over 7%, Riding Technical Breakout, Altcoin Wave
data.description:
🎧 Listen to This Article Prefer to listen? Hit play below to hear the narrated version. Doge Killer (LEASH), a token within the Shiba Inu ecosystem, is posting significant gains Friday, fueled by a potent mix of bullish technical signals, a surging broader altcoin market, and sustained interest from major holders, known as whales. The token jumped 7. 57% over a 24-hour period, part of a wider 15% weekly gain that saw it outpace Bitcoin
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/07/18/leash-surges-over-7-riding-technical-breakout-altcoin-wave/

data.title: US government $400M stake in rare earth company draws China comparisons
data.description:
The U. S. government has invested $400 million in MP Materials, a rare earth mining company. Stakeholders are criticizing the move, comparing it to China’s approach to market control. The United States government is facing backlash for investing $400 million in a domestic rare earth firm. The investment includes a price guarantee that is nearly double […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-government-rare-earth-china-comparison/

data.title: A transaction fee of more than 3.7 million ADA was transferred on the Cardano network, equivalent to about 3.03 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Whale Alert monitoring, a transaction on the Cardano network paid 3,700,001 ADA (US$3.03 million) in fees.

data.title: Cardano Network Transaction Incurs $3 Million Fee
data.description: According to Odaily, a transaction on the Cardano network has been recorded with a fee of 3,700,001 ADA, equivalent to approximately $3.03 million. This transaction was monitored by Whale Alert, highlighting the significant cost associated with the transfer.

data.title: KuCoin Launches xStocks, Bringing Tokenized Equities Like Tesla and S&P 500 to Crypto
data.description:
TL;DR KuCoin introduces xStocks, a new product line of tokenized equities, providing access to top US stocks like Tesla and the S&P 500 ETF through the Solana blockchain. Each token is fully backed by real shares secured in regulated custodial accounts. With over 41 million users globally, KuCoin aims to make diversified, flexible, and borderless. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/kucoin-launches-xstocks-bringing-tokenized-equities-like-tesla-and-sp-500-to-crypto/

data.title: Coinbase hits new high of $436 as insiders offload $230 million in shares this week
data.description:
Coinbase stock soared to a new all-time high of $436 during early trading on July 18, driven by renewed investor confidence following significant legislative wins for the crypto industry. According to Yahoo Finance data, this is the highest price for Coinbase shares since the company debuted on the Nasdaq in 2021.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/coinbase-hits-new-high-of-436-as-insiders-offload-230-million-in-shares-this-week/

data.title: Meme Coin Market Explodes 51% to $83B Since June, BONK and PENGU Lead Weekly Gains
data.description:
The meme coin market has surged 51% to $83. 5 billion since June 30, with BONK leading weekly gains at 50. 4% and Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) climbing 43. 2% as the sector experiences its strongest rally since April 2025.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/meme-coin-market-explodes-51-to-83b-since-june-bonk-and-pengu-lead-weekly-gains/

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $936 million, both long and short positions have exploded
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has a liquidation of US$936 million, with both long and short positions liquidated, of which long positions are US$469 million and short positions are liquidated US$467 million.
In addition, in the past 24 hours, ETH liquidated US$259 million and BTC liquidated US$173 million.

data.title: Public Companies Increase ETH, XRP, SOL Holdings as Part of Growing Treasury Strategies: Animoca Brands
data.description:
Public companies are increasingly adding altcoins like Ether (ETH), Solana’s SOL, and XRP to their treasury strategies, according to a new report from Animoca Brands Research.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/public-companies-increase-eth-xrp-sol-holdings-as-part-of-growing-treasury-strategies-animoca-brands/

data.title: Big Pharma joins crypto with a private placement for $100 Million Litecoin Treasury Strategy
data.description:
MEI Pharma announced Friday a $100 million private investment in public equity (PIPE) transaction to add Litecoin into its corporate treasury. The announcement is the first known instance of a publicly traded biotech company adopting Litecoin (LTC) as its primary reserve asset. Per a press statement published at 13:00 BTS, the investment round was led […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/big-pharma-in-crypto-100m-litecoin-treasury/

data.title: GENIUS Act Reshapes Stablecoin Strategy, Says Foresight Ventures Partner
data.description:
The GENIUS Act has cleared Congress, reshaping U. S. stablecoin oversight and prompting Ripple and Circle to apply for bank charters. Investment expert Alice Li explains this move as future-proofing operations amid rising regulatory pressure, with the sector expected to split into institutional and DeFi camps
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/genius-act-reshapes-stablecoin-strategy-says-foresight-ventures-partner/

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Rates are expected to fall sharply in the next year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee said the latest consumer price index data showed that tariffs pushed up commodity inflation, and he was "slightly concerned" about this. 
"It pains me to see the debate about the independence of the Federal Reserve. Interest rates are expected to fall significantly in the coming year." (Jinshi)
